prose: Frontier-orbital calculation on furan. Property: HOMO–LUMO gap (Koopmans-style orbital energy gap). Level of theory: DFT, tier 'standard' → B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF RKS, density-fitted). Geometry: user-supplied furan.xyz, single-point (not re-optimized at DFT). Environment: gas phase. Charge 0, multiplicity 1. SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity: status ok, trustworthy true. HOMO = −6.3597638 eV (index 17), LUMO = −0.1024036 eV (index 18), HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.2573602 eV. Total electronic energy = −230.11429 Hartree. CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 furan.xyz
